# ellmos-clatcher-mcp - MCP Utility Toolkit

> clatcher (Claude Patcher) is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that extends AI coding agents with utility tools they do not have natively: file repair, format conversion, duplicate detection, encoding fixes, batch operations, and archive handling. Part of the ellmos MCP family alongside filecommander (filesystem) and codecommander (code intelligence).

Covers 12 tools focused on the fix-and-convert layer: fix_json (strip comments, trailing commas, single quotes, BOM/NUL), fix_encoding (BOM removal, double-encoded UTF-8, cp1252 artifacts), fix_umlauts (German umlaut Mojibake), convert_format (JSON / YAML / TOML / XML / CSV / INI), detect_dupes (SHA256 content hashing), folder_diff (two-directory compare + snapshot), batch_rename (regex with dry-run preview), archive (ZIP create/extract/list), checksum (SHA256 / MD5 / SHA1 / SHA512), cleanup_file (BOM, whitespace, line endings, NUL stripping), scan_emoji (code-file emoji detection), regex_test (pattern debugging with groups).

All destructive tools default to dry-run mode -- writes require explicit `dry_run: false`. 122 tests (vitest) cover all 12 tools. Node.js >= 18, MIT. Published as `ellmos-clatcher-mcp` on npm.

## Docs

- [README (English)](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/blob/main/README.md): Tools overview, installation, family context
- [README (Deutsch)](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/blob/main/README_de.md): German version
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT license text
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ellmos-clatcher-mcp): Published artifact

## ellmos MCP family (sibling servers)

- [ellmos-filecommander-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp): Filesystem, process management, interactive sessions (43 tools)
- [ellmos-codecommander-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-codecommander-mcp): Code analysis, AST parsing, import management (17 tools)
- [n8n-manager-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/n8n-manager-mcp): n8n workflow management via MCP (13 tools)

## Broader ellmos ecosystem

- [BACH](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/bach): Full text-based OS for LLMs -- primary consumer of the MCP servers
- [Rinnsal](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/rinnsal): Lightweight LLM agent infrastructure
- [USMC](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc): Shared memory primitive

## Optional

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/issues): Bug reports and feature requests
